query: SELECT a.id, a.userId, a.instanceId, a.sourceGroupId, a.isActive, mg.groupName as sourceGroupName, mg.enviarOfertas as sourceEnviarOfertas FROM automations a LEFT JOIN monitored_groups mg ON mg.id = a.sourceGroupId WHERE a.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35L7q6jEd6akg49.root --database cTskjyF8t4ZYZoNMwpD42P --execute SELECT a.id, a.userId, a.instanceId, a.sourceGroupId, a.isActive, mg.groupName as sourceGroupName, mg.enviarOfertas as sourceEnviarOfertas FROM automations a LEFT JOIN monitored_groups mg ON mg.id = a.sourceGroupId WHERE a.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
